full_text:
Qiewanneng
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qiewanneng. Chieftain whose surrender to Jin was a major blow to Tufa Shujineng. Qiewanneng was affiliated with Xianbei and the Jin Dynasty.
